3. Upload image for each product
4. Click Publish

```
⏰ URGENT: Add Product Images
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Why: Make products visible on frontend
How: Studio → Products → Upload → Publish

Impact: HIGH (blocks frontend testing)
```

```
Impact: MEDIUM (enables user testing)
```
